name: claude-code-account-switcher
description: Quickly switch between Claude accounts (subscriptions) in Claude Code, with live usage limits.

commands.title: Claude: Park current credential (sign out here)
Claude: Pause/resume usage updates for account

claudeSwitcher.pollIntervalSeconds.markdownDescription: Target freshness (in seconds) for each account's usage limits. When several windows share a store they coordinate so each account is polled about this often *in total* (not per window). The endpoint is heavily rate-limited — values below 180s are raised to 180s.

claudeSwitcher.autoReloadAfterSwitch.markdownDescription: Automatically reload the VS Code window after switching accounts (required for Claude Code to pick up the new account). When disabled, the extension asks first.

claudeSwitcher.autoSuspend.markdownDescription: Automatically pause an account's usage updates after a rate limit (429) or an invalid/expired refresh token, until you press **Retry**. Previously fetched usage stays visible. When off, a 429 only backs off for 5 minutes and dead credentials are still skipped.

claudeSwitcher.sync.enabled.markdownDescription: Coordinate accounts, usage polling, and locking through a shared folder so many windows/devcontainers cooperate instead of colliding. When off, the extension only tracks the account currently logged in to this window.

claudeSwitcher.sync.folder.markdownDescription: Absolute path to the shared coordination folder. Empty = auto-detect a `.claude-account-switcher` directory in the workspace, otherwise fall back to `account-switcher/` next to the credentials file (e.g. `~/.claude/account-switcher/`). Token material is never written here — only metadata, ids, and usage. Reload the window after changing this.

claudeSwitcher.credentialsPath.markdownDescription: Path to the Claude Code `.credentials.json` file. Empty = default `~/.claude/.credentials.json`.

claudeSwitcher.warnThresholdPercent.markdownDescription: Usage threshold (%) above which the limit bar turns red.
